commands.repair_reason: Needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof before maintainer merge; no automated repair is appropriate without access to the contributor's Claude ACP setup.; Cleared: The diff only changes ACPX runtime delegation and a mocked regression test; it does not alter dependencies, workflows, secrets, packaging, or external downloads. commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the ACPX wrapper so OpenClaw one-shot session initialization delegates to ACPX persistent mode, and adds a mocked regression test for that handoff.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction is available from the PR. Source inspection of current main plus acpx@0.7.0 shows the ensure-to-runTurn split can close a one-shot client before the initial prompt, but the Claude failure still needs real runtime proof.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof before maintainer merge; no automated repair is appropriate without access to the contributor's Claude ACP setup.
